target.title: feat(telegram): opt-in interleaved progress lane
target.body:
## Summary

Add an opt-in Telegram renderer that projects reasoning text and structured runtime events into a single durable live message on the reasoning lane, matching CLI ergonomics without changing execution semantics.

**Gated on three conditions:** `toolProgressEnabled && interleavedProgress === true && hasReasoningLane` — inherits every existing group/DM/visibility gate.

## What it does

When `channels.telegram.streaming.preview.interleavedProgress` is enabled:
- Reasoning text streams into the interleaved message with a "Thinking" header
- Tool starts append a sanitized line (tool name only, never raw args by default)
- Item/plan/approval/command/patch events append title-only summary lines
- Rolling timer suffix shows elapsed time while running, cleared on completion
- Falls back to existing `pushStreamToolProgress` lane when the flag is off

## Key design choices

- **Projection-only** — no changes to prompts, model routing, tool execution, or auth
- **No raw data** — tool lines show name only; `interleavedToolArgs` is a separate opt-in for sanitized args
- **No new event contract** — consumes existing `onReasoningStream`, `onToolStart`, `onItemEvent`, `onPlanUpdate`, `onApprovalEvent`, `onCommandOutput`, `onPatchSummary` callbacks unchanged
- **Cumulative reasoning detection** — normalizes italic wrappers before `startsWith` comparison so cumulative snapshots that extend a line (e.g. `_alpha_` → `_alpha beta_`) replace rather than duplicate

## Depends on

- #80046 (CLI tool_use event bridge with sanitized args — by @adele-with-a-b)
- #85381 (CLI thinking_delta events — by @adele-with-a-b, stacked on #80046)
- #81851 (interactive backend that benefits from interleaved progress)

## Changed files

- `extensions/telegram/src/interleaved-progress.ts` — pure render helpers (gate, sanitize, header-strip, message render, reasoning checkpoint with italic-aware cumulative detection, status-line append)
- `extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.ts` — wire callbacks through renderer with fallback; clear rolling timer in `finally`; title-less event fallbacks (`planning`, `approval requested`, `patch`)
- `src/config/types.telegram.ts` + `src/config/zod-schema.providers-core.ts` — opt-in flag schema
- Config surface docs + bundled channel metadata regeneration

## Test plan

- [x] 24 unit tests covering: disabled-by-default, explicit opt-out, tool-progress-off, no-reasoning-lane, header dedup, rolling-timer lifecycle, whitespace-collapse + length cap, reasoning checkpoint cumulative delivery, italic-wrapper-aware cumulative detection
- [x] Live Telegram verification with `interleavedProgress: true` — [proof screenshot & gateway logs](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/87072#issuecomment-4573077672)
target.author: anagnorisis2peripeteia
